markets.question: Will Bitcoin be above $200,000 by December 31, 2026?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the daily closing price of BTC/USD on Coinbase exceeds $200,000 at any point before December 31, 2026, 23:59 UTC.

markets.question: Will Bitcoin be above $300,000 by December 31, 2026?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the daily closing price of BTC/USD on Coinbase exceeds $300,000 before the deadline.

markets.question: Who will be the next US President?
markets.description: Resolves to the inaugurated 47th President of the United States as confirmed by the Associated Press.

markets.question: Will Argentina win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description: Resolves YES if Argentina is officially declared champion by FIFA at the end of the 2026 World Cup final.

markets.question: Will Brazil win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description: Resolves YES if Brazil is officially declared champion by FIFA.

markets.question: Which team will win MVP this season?
markets.description: Multi-outcome — should be filtered out by the scraper.

title: How many SpaceX launches by EOY?

markets.question: How many SpaceX Falcon 9 launches by December 31, 2026?
markets.description: Resolves based on the count tracked by SpaceX's official launches page on December 31, 2026.

markets.question: Will the Fed cut rates between July 1 and September 30 2026?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the FOMC announces a federal funds rate cut on any meeting date within the stated window.
